name: amc-online
description: Australian Mathematics Competition online practice site

scripts.generate:2025: python3 scripts/generate_amc_questions.py --level a --year 2025 && python3 scripts/generate_amc_questions.py --level b --year 2025 && python3 scripts/generate_amc_questions.py --level c --year 2025 && python3 scripts/build_amc_library.py
